LanguageData.Ammo_NyaronCell.label: nyaron power cell
LanguageData.Ammo_NyaronCell.description: Energy cells for use in Nyaron energy weapons.

LanguageData.Bullet_NyaronCellBullet.label: nyaron shock bullet

LanguageData.Projectile_GreatArrowNyaron_Flame.label: great arrow (flame)
LanguageData.Ammo_NyaronFlakGrenade_HE.label: Nyaron flak grenade
